title: Python ledger refunds in one file
prompt: Fix the ledger project so refunds reduce monthly revenue and customer totals. Run pytest -q after the patch. Keep the change minimal.

title: CLI date filtering across modules
prompt: Fix the report CLI so --end-date is inclusive and totals include all rows through that date. Run pytest -q.

public_files.sales/cli.py:
from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import date
from decimal import Decimal

from sales.report import Sale, total_sales


def parse_sales(raw: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> list[Sale]:
    return [Sale(date.fromisoformat(day), Decimal(amount)) for day, amount in raw]


def render_total(raw: list[tuple[str, str]], start_date: str, end_date: str) -> str:
    total = total_sales(parse_sales(raw), date.fromisoformat(start_date), date.fromisoformat(end_date))
    return f"total={total}"
public_files.tests/test_report.py:
from sales.cli import render_total


def test_end_date_is_inclusive() -> None:
    raw = [("2026-06-01", "10.00"), ("2026-06-02", "15.00"), ("2026-06-03", "7.50")]

    assert render_total(raw, "2026-06-01", "2026-06-02") == "total=25.00"

title: Config precedence
prompt: Fix configuration loading so CLI values override environment values, and environment values override defaults. Run pytest -q.

public_files.app_config.py:
from __future__ import annotations

DEFAULTS = {"host": "127.0.0.1", "port": "8787", "debug": "false"}


def load_config(env: dict[str, str], cli: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, str]:
    config = dict(DEFAULTS)
    config.update(cli)
    config.update({key.removeprefix("APP_").lower(): value for key, value in env.items() if key.startswith("APP_")})
    return config

title: Markdown TOC idempotency
prompt: Fix the markdown TOC updater so running it repeatedly does not duplicate generated entries. Run pytest -q.

public_files.tests/test_toc.py:
from toc import update_toc


def test_update_toc_is_idempotent() -> None:
    original = "# Guide\n\n<!-- TOC -->\n\n## Install\n\n## Run\n"
    once = update_toc(original)
    twice = update_toc(once)

    assert twice == once
    assert once.count("- Install") == 1
    assert once.count("- Run") == 1

hidden_files.tests/test_hidden_toc.py:
from toc import update_toc


def test_toc_handles_document_without_blank_after_marker() -> None:
    original = "# Guide\n<!-- TOC -->\n## Install\n"
    assert update_toc(update_toc(original)).count("- Install") == 1

title: No-change guard
prompt: Check that the calculator already handles addition and subtraction correctly. Do not change files if the tests already pass. Run pytest -q.

public_files.tests/test_calculator.py:
from calculator import add, subtract


def test_add_and_subtract() -> None:
    assert add(2, 3) == 5
    assert subtract(7, 4) == 3
